title: Xeriscape Glassy Ethiopian Jelly Berbere Stew
description: Earthy, glassy-jelly, solo-dinner Ethiopian dish featuring red wine and coconut-cream-crack. Low-carb-friendly and perfect for a weeknight or one-pan meal.

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: 1/4 cup chopped fresh cilantro for garnish

instructions: Heat oil in a comal over medium heat. Add onion and cook until translucent. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add ground beef and cook, breaking up with spoon, until browned. Add berbere spice mix and cook for 1 minute.
Add red wine and beef broth. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in coconut milk and coconut cream. Simmer for 5 minutes.
Season with salt, black pepper, and crushed red pepper. Taste and adjust seasoning.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
